title: Proximity Housing Grant (Singles)
text:
Proximity Housing Grant (Singles) - SupportGoWhere
Proximity Housing Grant (Singles)
Share link
Provides up to $15,000 for eligible singles buying a resale flat to live with, or near, their parents or children.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Proximity Housing Grant (PHG) of $15,000 for singles living with parents or child
PHG of $10,000 for singles living near parents or child (within 4km)
If applicant is living near them, parents / child may be residing in either a HDB flat or private residential property to meet the PHG criteria
Collapse all sections
About this support

Receive a PHG of $15,000 if living with parents or child

Receive a PHG of $10,000 if living within 4km of parents or child

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen aged 35 or above, buying alone, with other single citizens or with their parents

Singapore Citizen aged 21 or above, buying with a non-resident spouse

The parents/child helping to qualify for the PHG must be Singapore Citizen or Singapore Permanent Resident

Applicants buying a resale flat to live with, or within 4km of, their parents or child

If parents/child are living with you, they must be included in the resale flat as co-applicants or essential occupiers

If your parents/child are living in a private residential property they do not own, it must be owner-occupied by immediate family members i.e. child, adopted child, parent(s) or parent(s)-in-law, or siblings

The resale flat has a remaining lease of more than 20 years

Applicants must not have received the PHG before

How to apply?

Obtain a HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter through the HDB Flat Portal

If you meet the eligibility criteria, you may apply for the grant when submitting your resale application

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Hotline: 6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
